items.definition: A complete shadcn theme — OKLCH color tokens, radius, and typography. Desiderio ships 15, switchable sitewide or per page subtree at runtime. A redesign in a dropdown.
The smallest Fluid 5 component, like d:atom.button or d:atom.badge. 17 atoms combine into 28 molecules and 4 layout primitives — consistency by construction.
A TYPO3 Content Blocks 2.2 element with its own schema, template, and backend preview. Desiderio bundles 244 of them in 10 groups, ready before your kickoff meeting.
A site setting that scales spacing across every element — compact for data-heavy sites, relaxed for editorial ones — without touching a single template.
A theme variable like background or muted-foreground. Elements only reference tokens, so switching the preset re-skins everything at once. The secret behind the one-click reskin.
